question: Between Max Verstappen and Charles Leclerc in the Abu Dhabi 2025 race session, who had the shorter stationary pit stop?
answer: Charles Leclerc had the shorter stationary pit stop at 20.902 seconds, compared with 21.703 seconds for Max Verstappen.
sql: SELECT p.driver_number, d.full_name, MIN(p.pit_duration) AS best_pit_duration FROM raw.pit p JOIN raw.drivers d ON d.session_key = p.session_key AND d.driver_number = p.driver_number WHERE p.session_key = 9839 AND p.driver_number IN (1, 16) GROUP BY p.driver_number, d.full_name ORDER BY best_pit_duration ASC
